sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (id UInt16, val Nullable(String));
SELECT id, IS NOT NULL(val) AS is_value_not_null FROM test_table WHERE IS NOT NULL(val) AND id IN (SELECT id FROM (SELECT emptyArrayUInt16() AS empty_array) AS sub WHERE length(empty_array) = 0);
SELECT COUNT() FROM test_table WHERE IS NOT NULL(val) HAVING COUNT() > (SELECT length(emptyArrayUInt16()));

SELECT val, IF(IS NOT NULL(val), 'exists', 'empty') AS existence_check FROM test_table WHERE emptyArrayUInt16() = array() UNION ALL SELECT val, 'none' FROM test_table WHERE IS NOT NULL(val) AND val NOT IN (SELECT emptyArrayUInt16() AS empty_array);
CREATE TABLE test_data (data Nullable(Int32), score UInt8);
SELECT SUM(score) FROM test_data WHERE IS NOT NULL(data) OR data IN (SELECT emptyArrayUInt16() AS empty_array FROM test_table);
SELECT data, SUM(score) FROM test_data GROUP BY data HAVING IS NOT NULL(data) AND (data IS NOT NULL OR data IN (SELECT emptyArrayUInt16()));
SELECT AVG(IF(IS NOT NULL(data), data, 0)) AS avg_data FROM test_data;
SELECT * FROM (SELECT id, emptyArrayUInt16() AS empty_array FROM test_table) AS sub WHERE IS NOT NULL(empty_array) ORDER BY id;
